arts.ttl: Liverpool earn smash-and-grab win as Harry Kane double puts Bayern in command

arts.ttl: Harry Kane gets away with 'David Beckham moment' against old rival Granit Xhaka
arts.sum: Harry Kane and Granit Xhaka faced off on many an occasion during North London Derbies and they were on opposite sides in the Champions League on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich 3-0: Bayer Leverkusen: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Harry Kane stars in Champions League rout
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany's Bayern Munich showed put on an attacking display in their Champions League round of 16 first leg against Bayer Leverkusen on Wednesday night.

arts.ttl: Kane at the double as Bayern ease to first-leg win against 10-man Leverkusen
arts.athr: Jonathan Liew at the Allianz Arena
arts.sum: Something seemed to break here, and it was not just Xabi Alonso’s proud unbeaten record over Bayern Munich. For Vincent Kompany are cruising to the Bundesliga title and now they are cruising to the Champions League quarter-finals too. They may well sign Leverkusen’s best player Florian Wirtz in the summer, but here they played him off the park. It feels like game over, and in more senses than one. This week the Bayern director of sport Max Eberl made an eye-catching comparison. He compared Alonso and Vincent Kompany to Pep Guardiola and Jürgen Klopp, the coaching duopoly that shaped modern football for almost a decade. Bit soon for all that, most people reckoned, but it feels just a little less fanciful now. The bloke who got Burnley relegated to the Championship may just be the next big thing in European coaching. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Kane double gives Bayern edge over Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane scored once in each half to guide his team to a 3-0 victory over 10-man Bayer Leverkusen in the all-German Champions League round of 16 first-leg match on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Kane gives Bayern the lead with 'brilliant' header
arts.sum: Harry Kane gives Bayern Munich the lead against Bayer Leverkusen with a "brilliant" header in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie.

arts.ttl: Bayern overpower 10-man Leverkusen to move closer to quarter-finals
arts.sum: Bayern Munich took a big step towards reaching the quarter-finals of the Champions League as they recorded their first win over Bayer Leverkusen since 2022.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Manuel Neuer leaves game with injury as Bayern Munich leads Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Bayern Munich captain Manuel Neuer left the game injured in the 54th minute after Jamal Musiala’s goal put the team up 2-0 over Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League, Manuel Neuer is injured, replaced by Jonas Urbig pic.twitter.com/SUOapAzx6l

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive Joshua Kimmich transfer green light as "deal of the century" claim made
arts.sum: Ex-Arsenal striker Jeremie Aliadiere explains why the Gunners signing Joshua Kimmich on a free transfer from Bayern Munich could be the "deal of the century".
